rationale_source: F4.EL elevated × F1.PC NB FSA cross-axis interaction

province_inferred.rationale: ASSERTION-2: F1.PC E-prefix → NB inference fires per R10-D. LIST-C-VERIFICATION-SURFACE-MISC (BATCH 12): gate-form corrected to BOOLEAN — the province_inferred gate observable is whether inference FIRED (a province_inferred_from_postal source tag OR a valid 2-letter province on the Snapshot City/Province row), not the value itself. The province VALUE 'NB' is verified separately via the prelim must_include 'NB|New Brunswick' below (render surface). Previously a non-boolean 'NB' which the engine skipped (could not evaluate).

workflow_state.rationale: Standard NB refi with elevated callout.
